domain: bicycle, scooter, and light mobility hardware

ideas.idea_title: Bicycle thru-axle chain tensioner dropout insert
ideas.product_context: Single-speed or internally geared bicycle frame with sliding rear dropouts
ideas.core_function: Provides precise fore-aft axle adjustment while maintaining wheel alignment under pedaling load
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined dropout insert with axle bore, adjustment screw seat, guide rails, and clamp faces
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires coaxial axle geometry, sliding contact faces, threaded adjustment features, asymmetric reliefs, and tight relationships between clamping and alignment surfaces

ideas.idea_title: Electric scooter folding stem hinge knuckle
ideas.product_context: Commuter electric scooter with a folding handlebar stem
ideas.core_function: Allows the stem to fold for storage while locking rigidly during riding
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined hinge knuckle with interlocking ears, pivot bore, latch pocket, stop faces, and cable clearance channel
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines hinge articulation geometry, nested forked features, hard stop surfaces, nontrivial pockets, and clearance routing in a compact safety-critical part

ideas.product_context: Long-tail or front-loader cargo bicycle needing a stable center stand
ideas.core_function: Connects twin kickstand legs to the frame and lets their stance width or angle be tuned
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined yoke block with paired leg sockets, cross-pin bores, frame interface bosses, and angular stop shoulders
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests mirrored but angled sockets, load-bearing bosses, intersecting holes, repeated pin features, and geometry that must communicate stance and mechanical limits

ideas.idea_title: Bicycle disc brake flat-mount adapter with cooling fins
ideas.product_context: Road or gravel bicycle adapting a caliper to a larger rotor size
ideas.core_function: Offsets the brake caliper to the correct rotor radius while adding heat-dissipating surface area
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined brake adapter with stepped mounting pads, through holes, counterbores, rotor-clearance arch, and integral fins
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires precise hole spacing, parallel datum surfaces, curved clearance envelopes, thin repeated fin geometry, and functional offsets

ideas.product_context: Light electric scooter with compact rear swingarm suspension
ideas.core_function: Transfers motion from the rear swingarm to a small shock absorber with defined leverage ratio
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined rocker link with three bearing bores, offset lobes, spacer bosses, and weight-relief pockets
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests multi-axis pivot relationships, organic but machinable link profiles, boss thickness transitions, pocketing, and bearing-seat precision

ideas.core_function: Applies over-center clamping force to secure the folding handlebar post
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined eccentric cam lever with pivot bore, cam surface, finger relief, and latch-pin contact pad
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires eccentric surfaces, smooth cam profiles, ergonomic lever shaping, contact patches, and clear representation of over-center locking geometry

ideas.idea_title: E-bike mid-drive motor torque arm spline clamp
ideas.product_context: Retrofitted or modular e-bike mid-drive system mounted near the bottom bracket
ideas.core_function: Resists motor reaction torque by clamping around a splined or keyed interface and tying into the frame
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined split clamp arm with spline-like bore features, pinch bolt ears, offset arm, and frame contact pad
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests internal keyed geometry, split-clamp behavior, bolt ear symmetry, torque-load path clarity, and blended transitions from circular clamp to structural arm

ideas.product_context: Light mobility recumbent tricycle with under-seat indirect steering
ideas.core_function: Converts handlebar linkage movement into tie-rod motion for front wheel steering
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined bellcrank with central bearing boss, two offset linkage holes, tapered arms, and angular indexing marks
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires accurate angular relationships, multiple pivot centers, non-rectilinear arm shapes, bearing features, and clear mechanical intent through linkage geometry

ideas.idea_title: Bicycle dynamo hub wire-exit strain relief cap
ideas.product_context: Touring bicycle front hub with integrated dynamo wiring
ideas.core_function: Protects the electrical connector and guides the wire away from the spinning hub and spokes
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined protective cap with hub-interface bore, wire channel, clamp screw boss, curved outer shield, and anti-rotation tab
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests small protective shell geometry, internal channels, anti-rotation features, screw bosses, and spatial clearance around rotating bicycle components

ideas.idea_title: Manual wheelchair quick-release caster fork crown
ideas.product_context: Lightweight manual wheelchair or adaptive mobility chair
ideas.core_function: Holds the front caster fork and enables quick removal or height adjustment
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined caster crown block with vertical stem bore, transverse release-pin hole, stepped height-index grooves, and fork lug interfaces
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines vertical and transverse precision holes, indexed adjustment features, fork interface geometry, compact load paths, and accessibility-focused mechanical detail
